mapper.select: SELECT t1.projectCode, t1.projectName, t4.departmentName AS officeName, '不予跟踪确认' AS taskName, t1.isback, t5.memberName AS programManager, t1.projectId, '工程管理部' AS assignee, '不予跟踪确认流程' AS procTypeDesc FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '20' LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t5 ON t1.`projectId` = t5.`projectId` AND t5.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t5.`memberRole` = '30' LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t3 ON t3.dataTypeCode = '23' AND basicDataId = '50' LEFT JOIN fnd_department t4 ON t1.column001 = t4.departmentNum AND t4.`status` = 1 WHERE t1.`projectState` IN (30, 31, 32, 20) AND t1.isback IN ('42', '50') AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL

SELECT ps.`projectId` AS applyNum, ps.`projectCode`, ps.`projectName`, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, pm.`memberName` AS realName, '工程人员' AS assigneeName, ps.`createTime`, 'ProjectSupervision' AS procTypeName, '项目督查' AS procTypeDesc, '填写督查问卷' AS taskName FROM `pm_project_supervision` ps LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON ps.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON ps.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` WHERE ps.isdelete = FALSE AND ps.state = FALSE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.`notifySubject`, b.`notifyContent`, b.`projectId`, a.`id` AS stateId, b.`createTime`, a.`checkTime`, a.notifyState FROM `pm_project_notification_state` a LEFT JOIN `pm_project_notification` b ON a.`notifyId` = b.`id` WHERE notifyObject = #{username} AND notifyState = 0 ORDER BY b.`createTime` DESC ) AS tmp UNION ALL ( SELECT b.`notifySubject`, b.`notifyContent`, b.`projectId`, a.`id` AS stateId, b.`createTime`, a.`checkTime`, a.notifyState FROM `pm_project_notification_state` a LEFT JOIN `pm_project_notification` b ON a.`notifyId` = b.`id` WHERE notifyObject = #{username} AND notifyState = 1 ORDER BY a.`checkTime` DESC, b.`createTime` DESC LIMIT 100 )
mapper.update: UPDATE `pm_project_notification_state` SET notifyState = 1, checkTime = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
